text_raw: Aye. Looks a right bloody mess.
text_clean: Aye. Looks a right bloody mess.

text_raw: You mean that coup?
text_clean: You mean that coup?

text_raw: They're all cut from the same shitrag. Come on, let's be off.
text_clean: They're all cut from the same shitrag. Come on, let's be off.

text_raw: Do you reckon... this'll turn into a war?
text_clean: Do you reckon... this'll turn into a war?

text_raw: Feels like every sod's a traitor these days...
text_clean: Feels like every sod's a traitor these days...

text_raw: I hear a few nobles got themselves killed recently.
text_clean: I hear a few nobles got themselves killed recently.

text_raw: Spotted some strange metal thing flyin' about. Any idea what it is?
text_clean: Spotted some strange metal thing flyin' about. Any idea what it is?

text_raw: Not a clue. Heard it's the work of some Delesyian lord.
text_clean: Not a clue. Heard it's the work of some Delesyian lord.

text_raw: Aye. Soldiers've been pouring into Fort Musket from all over.
text_clean: Aye. Soldiers've been pouring into Fort Musket from all over.

text_raw: Aye. Back the wrong side, and we won't live to get paid.
text_clean: Aye. Back the wrong side, and we won't live to get paid.

text_raw: Feels like a war's about to break out.
text_clean: Feels like a war's about to break out.

text_raw: Who d'you reckon's got the edge?
text_clean: Who d'you reckon's got the edge?

text_raw: My coin will be coming from whoever's winning.
text_clean: My coin will be coming from whoever's winning.

text_raw: Well, my coin is on the allied forces.
text_clean: Well, my coin is on the allied forces.

text_raw: What in Solumen's white light is {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Caliburn:Title#Duke Caliburn} thinking?
text_clean: What in Solumen's white light is {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Caliburn:Title#Duke Caliburn} thinking?

text_raw: Maybe we were wrong about him from the start, know what I mean?
text_clean: Maybe we were wrong about him from the start, know what I mean?

text_raw:
I don't know... But one thing's for certain, I can tell you.
He's not the man we thought he was.
text_clean:
I don't know... But one thing's for certain, I can tell you.
He's not the man we thought he was.

text_raw: He was our last hope... Now we've got nothing.
text_clean: He was our last hope... Now we've got nothing.

text_raw: Can't you tell? Look at all the bloody soldiers.
text_clean: Can't you tell? Look at all the bloody soldiers.

text_raw: Oh, well they'll dress it up as duty, then throw us out as fodder. Always do.
text_clean: Oh, well they'll dress it up as duty, then throw us out as fodder. Always do.

text_raw: So... war really is coming, eh?
text_clean: So... war really is coming, eh?

text_raw: I hope they don't drag us off to fight again...
text_clean: I hope they don't drag us off to fight again...

text_raw: Watch your tongue!
text_clean: Watch your tongue!

text_raw: Did you see that house floating in the sky?
text_clean: Did you see that house floating in the sky?

text_raw: You mean that thing above Fort Musket?
text_clean: You mean that thing above Fort Musket?

text_raw: You think it's a house? Well Ill be damned...
text_clean: You think it's a house? Well Ill be damned...

text_raw: I tried to get up close, but they won't let anyone near it.
text_clean: I tried to get up close, but they won't let anyone near it.

text_raw: Demeniss, Hernand, Pailune... Seems they're all on the same side.
text_clean: Demeniss, Hernand, Pailune... Seems they're all on the same side.

text_raw: Some Demenissian noble, apparently...
text_clean: Some Demenissian noble, apparently...

text_raw: Who on earth are they waging war against with this many men?
text_clean: Who on earth are they waging war against with this many men?

text_raw: Aye, w-we were.
text_clean: Aye, w-we were.

text_raw: Word is, some Demeniss noble's the one who sickened His Majesty.
text_clean: Word is, some Demeniss noble's the one who sickened His Majesty.

text_raw: Best not ask, unless you fancy trouble.
text_clean: Best not ask, unless you fancy trouble.

text_raw: Was that so? Well, who was it?
text_clean: Was that so? Well, who was it?

text_raw: Then why'd you even bring it up?
text_clean: Then why'd you even bring it up?

text_raw: Didn't they kill off all the traitors before?
text_clean: Didn't they kill off all the traitors before?

text_raw: So what's going on? There's still more traitors left?
text_clean: So what's going on? There's still more traitors left?

text_raw: Did you see that cannon at Fort Musket?
text_clean: Did you see that cannon at Fort Musket?

text_raw: Such a weapon could end countless lives...
text_clean: Such a weapon could end countless lives...

text_raw: We should keep our heads low, pray all passes.
text_clean: We should keep our heads low, pray all passes.

text_raw: Aye, let's be on our way.
text_clean: Aye, let's be on our way.

text_raw: I saw it alright. That thing was bloody massive!
text_clean: I saw it alright. That thing was bloody massive!

text_raw: By Solumen, never a bloody peaceful day for us...
text_clean: By Solumen, never a bloody peaceful day for us...
